name: ORCHID NOIR
description:
Top Notes (Head): The first impression immediately after spraying. They are light, sharp, and fade within 10-15 minutes.
Middle Notes (Heart): The main body of the fragrance that emerges as the top notes fade. They last 2-4 hours and are often floral, fruity, or spicy.
Base Notes (Found): The foundation of the perfume. These rich, heavy notes appear last and linger for 6-8+ hours.
